targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS value FROM reporting.session_summary WHERE queued_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
SELECT coalesce(avg(functional_completion),0) AS value FROM reporting.session_summary WHERE queued_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
SELECT count(*) AS value FROM reporting.session_summary WHERE status='failed' AND queued_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
SELECT count(*) AS value FROM reporting.session_summary WHERE status='awaiting_approval'
SELECT count(*) AS value FROM reporting.session_summary WHERE status='running' AND heartbeat_at < now()-interval '2 minutes'

SELECT run_id,session_id,regexp_replace(user_id,'(^.).*(@.*$)','\1***\2') AS user_id,left(request,160) AS task,status,current_phase,functional_completion,duration_ms,total_tokens,error_category,incident_summary->>'breaking_point' AS breaking_point,queued_at FROM reporting.session_summary WHERE queued_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY queued_at DESC LIMIT 250

SELECT run_id,sequence_no,title,service,tool_name,status,risk_level,requires_approval,duration_ms,error_category,error_message,started_at,completed_at FROM reporting.step_timeline ORDER BY coalesce(started_at,completed_at) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 500
SELECT * FROM reporting.improvement_queue ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100
